title: QA automatizācijas speciālists / QA Automation Specialist (Playwright / TypeScript)

summary.lv: TonyBet meklē QA automatizācijas speciālistu ar praktisko pieredzi Playwright un TypeScript, kurš/-a automatizēs galvenos lietotāju scenārijus sporta likmju platformā un integrēs testus CI/CD procesos.
summary.en: TonyBet is looking for a QA Automation Specialist with hands-on Playwright and TypeScript experience to automate critical user flows across their sports betting platform and integrate tests into CI/CD pipelines.
